title: Monday.com Widget for Android Home Screen - My Personal Tasks

posts.author: KatieC (Katie Claessens)
posts.cookedHtml:
I like the Monday home screen widget.
I like the “Recent Boards” list you can have showing on the home screen.
I would like it if we could have a view just like that one but that shows the “My Private Tasks” list and have the user able to check things off and add tasks from that view on the Android home screen.
